name: io.github.pramodmisra/carrier-accounting-mcp
description: Insurance carrier accounting automation for Applied Epic agencies. Ingest PDFs/Excel, AI-normalize with Claude, 5-layer reconciliation (99.5% accuracy), post to Epic. 48+ carriers supported.

environment_variables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Anthropic API key for LLM normalization of carrier statements
